title: [M0] Harden local/testnet environment rails
body:
Milestone: M0 Foundation
Problem: Environments drift and break confidence in early delivery.
Scope: Lock dev/testnet env templates, readiness checks, and startup diagnostics.
Acceptance Criteria:
- scripts/testnet-readiness.ps1 passes in simulated mode
- /health reports no critical failures in local mode
- docs updated with runbook commands

title: [M0] Stabilize contract deploy and smoke loop
body:
Milestone: M0 Foundation
Problem: Deploy/mint loop can fail due to config and funding gaps.
Scope: Validate deploy preflight and smoke scripts in CI and local.
Acceptance Criteria:
- deploy:sbt:dry succeeds with clear output
- scripts/testnet-smoke.ps1 simulated mode passes
- funding/deploy errors are actionable

title: [M1] Expand onboarding profile schema in API
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: API profile payload is too narrow for Profile DNA model.
Scope: Add legalName, covenantName, purposeStatement, coreSkills, callings, biometric flags with backward compatibility.
Acceptance Criteria:
- /onboarding/signup accepts new fields and legacy aliases
- profile persistence includes normalized fields
- docs/onboarding.md updated

title: [M1] Initialize Bronze trust on signup
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: Bronze assignment is not guaranteed at first profile creation.
Scope: Initialize trust score and level during signup using deterministic Bronze bounds.
Acceptance Criteria:
- new signup returns trust payload
- profile stores trustScore and trustLevel
- trust lookup returns Bronze for fresh users

title: [M1] Add verifier submission endpoint
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: no endpoint to submit trusted human verification sources.
Scope: Add /onboarding/verifier-submission with validator rules and profile linkage.
Acceptance Criteria:
- endpoint persists submission entries
- submission count is returned
- invalid verifierType is rejected with 400

title: [M1] Upgrade web signup UX for profile DNA
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: web form does not collect full onboarding schema.
Scope: add fields for legal/covenant name, purpose statement, callings, docs and show trust tier response.
Acceptance Criteria:
- signup page submits expanded payload
- success state surfaces trust tier
- no regressions for existing userId flow

title: [M1] Implement mobile onboarding form
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: mobile client is placeholder and cannot onboard users.
Scope: replace placeholder with signup form posting to API endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria:
- App.js submits to /onboarding/signup
- status/errors displayed in-app
- emulator connectivity note documented

title: [M1] Add onboarding API regression tests
body:
Milestone: M1 Identity Onboarding
Problem: signup/verifier changes may regress without coverage.
Scope: add HTTP tests for happy path + validation failures.
Acceptance Criteria:
- tests for signup normalization and Bronze assignment
- tests for verifier submission 201/400/404
- npm test passes

title: [M2] Build document verification workflow
body:
Milestone: M2 Verification + Mint
Problem: verification status transitions are too manual and weakly audited.
Scope: formalize review statuses, reviewer metadata, and timestamps.
Acceptance Criteria:
- /onboarding/verify writes reviewer audit fields
- only allowed transitions succeed
- rejected and approved paths tested

title: [M2] Wire verification-gated SBT mint flow
body:
Milestone: M2 Verification + Mint
Problem: mint eligibility and profile state coupling need stronger guarantees.
Scope: enforce verification gate and idempotent mint linkage in profile record.
Acceptance Criteria:
- unapproved users cannot mint
- approved users mint and persist tx hash/token id
- duplicate mint attempts return deterministic error

title: [M2] Implement trust upgrade policy engine
body:
Milestone: M2 Verification + Mint
Problem: trust promotions are not centralized with reason codes.
Scope: codify Bronze/Silver/Gold transition rules and persist reasons.
Acceptance Criteria:
- trust endpoint returns level + reason
- transitions logged and reproducible
- boundary values covered by tests

title: [M3] Add milestone tracking API for Purpose Guide
body:
Milestone: M3 Purpose Guide
Problem: no persistent milestone model for purpose journey.
Scope: add CRUD endpoints and profile linkage for milestones.
Acceptance Criteria:
- create/list/complete milestone endpoints exist
- milestone metadata includes due date/status
- dashboard aggregates milestone summary

title: [M3] Integrate guide context retrieval into chat
body:
Milestone: M3 Purpose Guide
Problem: chat guide responses are not consistently grounded in profile + milestones.
Scope: enrich /ai/chat context with profile, trust, and active milestones.
Acceptance Criteria:
- responses include contextual references
- fallback behavior is deterministic when context is missing
- tests verify context loading path

title: [M3] Surface Purpose Guide panel in mobile
body:
Milestone: M3 Purpose Guide
Problem: mobile experience lacks guide interaction.
Scope: add simple guide chat UI connected to /ai/chat.
Acceptance Criteria:
- user can send and receive guide messages
- request tied to active userId
- basic error/retry UX included

title: [M4] Implement LifePass SSO assertion service
body:
Milestone: M4 Multi-Portal Access
Problem: cross-portal identity assertions are not productized.
Scope: issue and validate signed assertions with trust claims.
Acceptance Criteria:
- one login unlocks at least one downstream portal
- assertion includes userId, trustLevel, expiry
- verification middleware rejects invalid tokens

title: [M4] Add QR verification payload support
body:
Milestone: M4 Multi-Portal Access
Problem: offline verification path is missing.
Scope: generate signed QR payloads and validation endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria:
- QR payload has signature + expiry
- verifier endpoint validates authenticity
- replay/expiry cases rejected

title: [M4] Add access audit trail and monitoring
body:
Milestone: M4 Multi-Portal Access
Problem: access events are not centrally auditable.
Scope: structured event logs for authentication and portal entry actions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- each access event logs userId, portal, outcome, timestamp
- failed and successful attempts are queryable
- docs include incident triage steps
